languages.text: "Администратум работает только при строгом соблюдении правил. Убив меня, вам придется заполнить форму 24-Гамма/7 о порче имущества суда".
"The Administratum operates under strict adherence to the rules. If you kill me, you will have to fill out Form 24-Gamma/7 to account for the damage you have caused to court property."
languages.original_text: "Администратум работает только при строгом соблюдении правил. Убив меня, вам придется заполнить форму 24-Гамма/7 о порче имущества суда".

traits.locale_text: "The Administratum operates under strict adherence to the rules. Should you kill me, you will have to fill out Form 24-Gamma/7 form to account for the damage to court property."
"The Administratum operates under strict adherence to the rules. If you kill me, you will have to fill out Form 24-Gamma/7 to account for the damage you have caused to court property."
"The Administratum operates under strict adherence to the rules. If you kill me, you will have to fill out Form 24-Gamma/7 to account for the damage you have caused to court property."
"The Administratum operates under strict adherence to the rules. If you kill me, you will have to fill out Form 24-Gamma/7 to account for the damage you have caused to court property."
"The Administratum operates under strict adherence to the rules. If you kill me, you will have to fill out Form 24-Gamma/7 to account for the damage you have caused to court property."

languages.text: "Das Administratum operiert unter strikter Beachtung der Regeln. Solltet Ihr mich töten, müsst Ihr Formular 24-Gamma/7 ausfüllen, um Euch für den an gerichtlichem Eigentum entstandenen Schaden zu verantworten."
languages.original_text: "The Administratum operates under strict adherence to the rules. If you kill me, you will have to fill out Form 24-Gamma/7 to account for the damage you have caused to court property."

traits.locale_text: "Das Administratum operiert unter strikter Beachtung der Regeln. Solltet Ihr mich töten, müsst Ihr Formular 24-Gamma/7 ausfüllen, um Euch für den an gerichtlichem Eigentum entstandenen Schaden zu verantworten."

languages.text: « L'Administratum requiert une observation rigoureuse des règles. Si vous me tuez, vous devrez remplir le formulaire 24-Gamma/7 pour déclarer les dommages causés à la propriété du tribunal. »
languages.original_text: "The Administratum operates under strict adherence to the rules. If you kill me, you will have to fill out Form 24-Gamma/7 to account for the damage you have caused to court property."

traits.locale_text: « L'Administratum requiert une observation rigoureuse des règles. Si vous me tuez, vous devrez remplir le formulaire 24-Gamma/7 pour déclarer les dommages causés à la propriété du tribunal. »

languages.text: “内政部办事必须遵循严格规定。如果您杀了我，那您必须填写24-伽马/7号表单，详细阐述您对内政部财产造成的损失。”
languages.original_text: "The Administratum operates under strict adherence to the rules. If you kill me, you will have to fill out Form 24-Gamma/7 to account for the damage you have caused to court property."

traits.locale_text: “内政部办事必须遵循严格规定。如果您杀了我，那您必须填写24-伽马/7号表单，详细阐述您对内政部财产造成的损失。”

languages.text: «El Administratum aplica las reglas de forma estricta. Si me mata, tendrá que rellenar el formulario 24-Gamma/7 para responder por los daños a la propiedad de la corte».
languages.original_text: "The Administratum operates under strict adherence to the rules. If you kill me, you will have to fill out Form 24-Gamma/7 to account for the damage you have caused to court property."

traits.locale_text: «El Administratum aplica las reglas de forma estricta. Si me mata, tendrá que rellenar el formulario 24-Gamma/7 para responder por los daños a la propiedad de la corte».

languages.text: 「行政局は、厳格な規定に則って運営されています。もし私を殺せば、裁判所の財産に生じた損害について説明するために、フォーム24-ガンマ/7の記入が必要になります」
languages.original_text: "The Administratum operates under strict adherence to the rules. If you kill me, you will have to fill out Form 24-Gamma/7 to account for the damage you have caused to court property."

traits.locale_text: 「行政局は、厳格な規定に則って運営されています。もし私を殺せば、裁判所の財産に生じた損害について説明するために、フォーム24-ガンマ/7の記入が必要になります」

languages.text: "Administratum kurallara titizlikle riayet eder. Beni öldürürseniz mahkeme malına verdiğiniz zararı beyan etmek için 24-Gamma/7 formu doldurmak zorunda kalırsınız."
languages.original_text: "The Administratum operates under strict adherence to the rules. If you kill me, you will have to fill out Form 24-Gamma/7 to account for the damage you have caused to court property."

traits.locale_text: "Administratum kurallara titizlikle riayet eder. Beni öldürürseniz mahkeme malına verdiğiniz zararı beyan etmek için 24-Gamma/7 formu doldurmak zorunda kalırsınız."
